mapper.select: SELECT member_pk, member_name, member_id, member_password_hash, member_email FROM member
SELECT member.member_pk AS memberPk, member.member_name AS memberName, member.member_password_hash AS memberPasswordHash FROM member WHERE member_id=#{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (member_name, member_id, member_password_hash, member_email) VALUES (#{memberName}, #{memberId}, #{memberPasswordHash}, #{memberEmail})
